## Meeting Purpose

[Review and discuss progress on the GrowthxLabs website development, focusing on design, functionality, and content management.](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Website staging is now viewable, with fluid scroll effects and panel transitions implemented](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Strapi CMS is set up and ready for content population](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Minor UI/UX issues identified (e.g., "How it works" section timing, dropdown styling)](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Overall progress is positive, with the project nearing completion pending content updates and minor adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

## Topics

### Website Design and Functionality Review

  - [Staging environment now accessible, showcasing scroll effects and panel transitions](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Video and panel effects described as "organic" and "fluent"](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Scroll rhythm demonstrated, receiving positive feedback from Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Issue identified: "How it works" section starts on step 4/5 instead of step 1 when scrolling into view](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Dropdown menu for resources section needs UI refinement (looks "clunky" and not well-integrated)](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Jump links in the top navigation are not currently functional](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Navigation bar is sticky, disappearing on scroll up (intentional design)](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

### Content Management System (CMS)

  - [Strapi CMS successfully set up and ready for use](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Link to Strapi instance shared during the meeting](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Marcel plans to populate content this week, including testimonials and statistics](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Juan Pablo has prepared specific documentation for Strapi usage, to be shared post-meeting](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)

### Feedback and Iteration Process

  - [Team to create a Google Sheet for collecting and tracking feedback](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Marcel to provide detailed feedback today or tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Development team to work on updates based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Aim to present updates and the tools page design on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Kernel integration in progress to ensure proper CTA functionality](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [GitHub organization created by Marcel's team](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Plan to move project repositories to client's GitHub org and grant access to the development team](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [DNS configuration to be handled as a final step to avoid premature site redirection](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### Documentation and Handover

  - [Development team preparing comprehensive documentation for Strapi and other aspects](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Additional documentation on upcoming sessions to be completed and shared](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [CTO Daniel to be involved in environment setup and handover process](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

  - [Plan repository migration to client's GitHub organization](https://fathom.video/share/tM8wCF9PJpFairtMzCWmsjTXJQbXVGxa?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
